channel.title: shell on Entropy Decrease
channel.description: Recent content in shell on Entropy Decrease

item.title: a few Unix and Shell tips
item.description: automatically attach to a tmux session via SSH 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 alias alias_name='ssh username@servername -t "tmux attach || tmux" ' -t Force pseudo-tty allocation. This can be used to execute arbitrary screen-based programs on a remote machine, which can be very useful, e.g., when implementing menu services. "tmux attach" tries to attach a tmux session. and if it fails, "tmux" will create a new session. to
